title: How One Closed Door Changes the Man You're Becoming
caption:
Most men are fighting a war they keep choosing to lose.

Not because they're weak — because they're fighting at the wrong moment. By the time temptation shows up, willpower is already low and the access point is already open.

The door isn't the sin. It's the route in. The private browser. The late-night scroll. The habit you keep in arm's reach.

You don't beat it by being stronger in the moment. You beat it by deciding before the moment. Close the door tonight — delete the app, put the filter on, tell one man what you're closing and why. The physical act of closing it is the beginning of becoming the man who doesn't need it anymore.

What one door will you close tonight? Save this for the night you almost don't.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #selfcontrol #christianity #killsin
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
